name: Casey Jones One Dish Supper
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Loaf frozen white bread - dough, thawed (1 lb size)
1 tsp Beef soup mix (or beef bouillon mix such as Oxo)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until crispy, then set aside.
2. Brown the beef and onions in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Drain if necessary.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the pot and stir well.
4. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Remove from the stovetop and let cool slightly or warm through.
6. Divide the dough into 20 pieces and place on top of the warm beef mixture.
7. Cover with a clean towel and let rise until the bread pieces have doubled in size, about 30 minutes.
8. Lightly brush the dough with beaten egg and sprinkle with bacon bits.
9. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 25-30 minutes.
10. Makes 8 servings. The remaining bread dough can be made into rolls.
